members.name: H. Lawrence Culp Jr.
members.title: Chairman and CEO
members.bio: Leading GE's industrial transformation. Focus on operational efficiency and lean manufacturing practices.

members.name: Paula Rosput Reynolds
members.title: Lead Independent Director
members.bio: Former CEO of AGL Resources. Experience in utility operations and energy technology.

members.name: Thomas Horton
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CEO of American Airlines. Background in aviation operations management.

members.name: Catherine Lesjak
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CFO of HP Inc. Experience in technology company finance and digital transformation initiatives.

members.name: James Mulva
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CEO of ConocoPhillips. Background in energy sector operations.

strategy_text: GE is focused on lean manufacturing and operational excellence across its aerospace and energy businesses. Technology investment is directed at industrial IoT and digital twin capabilities to improve operational efficiency.
